meaning: adj.腐烂的,恶臭的,堕落的,(岩石等)风化的,虚弱的,无用的
examples: You can keep your rotten money!
The pond was choked with rotten leaves.
Having outgrown PBS, it has inherited the rotten reputation that once attached to the medium itself.
Work is being carried out to reduce the "rotten eggs" smell from a Milton Keynes landfill.
